jd_text:
We are currently seeking a detail-oriented and experienced Project EHS Head to join our team, to be based at a Project Site in Abu Dhabi, UAE. The ideal candidate will be responsible for leading and managing the EHS strategy and operations for a large-scale project, ensuring that all activities are conducted in compliance with local, national, and international EHS regulations and standards.
Key Responsibilities:Provide direction, leadership, organization, control and support for the occupational health, hygiene, safety, quality, and environmentally functional area for the renewable project.Initiate the design, development and management of implementation and maintenance of organizational safety, health, quality, and environment management systems.Initiate and maintain an effective environmental management program for Project.Manage occupational health and safety, hygiene, environmental and quality resources.Initiate, collaborate and manage construction health, hygiene, and safety management for the Project.Ensure that project has the required approval for project EHS plan in place.Initiate and manage optimization of business efficiency and continuity.Accompany Head of EHS to attend review meetings organized by Employer/CE related to health & safety issues and keep stakeholders informed.Attending weekly review meeting organized by Head of EHS along with other Project management team members and necessary site team members.
Qualification & Experience:Bachelor’s degree in engineering or environmental science, Occupational Health.Minimum of 20+ years of EHS experience, with at least 5+ years in a senior leadership role within a global organization.In-depth knowledge of international EHS regulations and best practices.Proven track record of successfully developing and executing EHS programs in a large, complex organization.Strong analytical, communication, and interpersonal skills.Relevant certifications (e.g., NEBOSH, CSP, CIH) are mandate.
